2026-03-24.title: Epica - Consign to Oblivion [Parte 1/2] (0-8s)
2026-03-24.preview: Parte 1 (0-8s): Biblioteca vitoriana noturna. Piano arpeggios suaves, build-up orquestral. Jhenn íntima, olhos fechados. Close nas mãos. Iluminação azul/warm.
2026-03-24.content:
## VEO3 Prompt - Epica - Consign to Oblivion (Parte 1 de 2) — 8s

A gothic symphonic metal piano cover in a Victorian library at midnight. Black grand piano, ancient books, floating sheet music, dramatic candlelight, shadows dancing on walls. Piano keys glow faintly.

Music (0-8s): Soft piano arpeggios, melancholic, building gradually. Orchestral layers will appear visually in Part 2.

Jhenn's expression: intimate, eyes closed, deeply feeling the music. Close-ups on hands showing finger movement. Slow push-in on her face.

Lighting: cool blue from distant streetlights, warm accent from lantern.

Duration: EXACTLY 8 seconds.

metadata.scene: Victorian library at midnight, candles, ancient books, floating sheet music

2026-03-24.title: Epica - Consign to Oblivion [Parte 2/2] (8-12s)
2026-03-24.preview: Parte 2 (8-12s): Clímax orquestral. Orquestra fantasma materializa-se. Riff principal poderoso. Jhenn intensa. Nota sustain final. 4s apenas.
2026-03-24.content:
## VEO3 Prompt - Epica - Consign to Oblivion (Parte 2 de 2) — 4s

Continuation from Parte 1. Same Victorian library at midnight. Black grand piano, ancient books, floating sheet music, candlelight.

Music (8-12s total): The orchestras materialize visually as ghostly musicians in the background (strings, brass). The music swells to the climax — main riff played powerfully on piano. Then fade to a single sustaining high note.

Jhenn's expression: from intimate to epic, eyes now open wide, intense. Camera widens to show the library and the ghostly orchestra. Magical light effects.

This part is ONLY 4 seconds long (to combine with Part 1 for total 12s).

Duration: EXACTLY 4 seconds.

2026-03-25.title: Pijama Gótico - TikTok Shop (16s)
2026-03-25.preview: Vídeo de 16s mostrando o pijama branco com corações em cenário gótico. Modelo acordando, mostrando detalhes do tecido canelado e cordão preto. Conforto e estilo.
2026-03-25.content:
## VEO3 Prompt - Pijama Gótico TikTok Shop (16s)

Vertical 9:16, product video vibe. Jhenn, cover pianista gótica (morena, long black hair, dark makeup) OR modelo bronzeada loira rabo de cavalo (conforme imagem do produto). Ambiente: quarto com decoração gótica (abajur de ferro, cortinas escuras) ou luz suave da manhã pela janela.

Ela veste pijama branco acetinado: top de alças finas + shorts com cordão preto na cintura. Tecido canelado (ribbed), pequenos corações em preto e rosa claro. Caimento confortável e fluido.

Cena natural e descontraída:
- 0-3s: Close no rosto ao acordar, mostrando alça do top
- 3-6s: Caminha, mostra a calça com cordão e corações
- 6-10s: Close nos detalhes: textura canelada, corações, brilho sutil do acetinado
- 10-13s: Senta no sofá/varanda com livro, mostrando conforto
- 13-16s: Olha pra câmera: "Esse pijama tá muito amor! Link na bio!" + piscada

Iluminação: luz quente de abajur ou nascer do sol. Som ambiente: café sendo preparado, nota de piano suave no final (C# menor). Estilo: autêntico, não encenado, vibe íntima. Camera: handheld natural, shallow depth of field.

Duration: EXACTLY 16 seconds.
Format: Vertical 9:16, no audio.

2026-03-26.title: Never Enough - Lindsey Stirling
2026-03-26.preview: First-person view approaching Jhenn at the piano by the window. Back of her head, then hands. Immersive, handheld, city lights.
2026-03-26.content:
## VEO3 Prompt - POV Approach — 8s

First person POV: standing behind Jhenn, slowly approaching. She is sitting at a piano near a large window at night, city lights blurred outside.

[0.0-2.0s] Camera starts a few meters back, focused on her back and long dark purple hair. She is fully immersed, unaware.

[2.0-5.0s] The camera moves forward naturally, slight handheld movement, breathing-like motion. Her shoulders and upper back come into view.

[5.0-8.0s] Closer now, her hands on the keys become visible from above. Still no eye contact. The reflection of city lights dances on the window glass.

Ultra realistic, handheld feel, no cinematic perfection. Vertical 9:16. No talking.

Duration: EXACTLY 8 seconds.

metadata.scene: Night, window, city lights, immersive approach

2026-03-26.title: Never Enough - Lindsey Stirling
2026-03-26.preview: Jhenn seen only through reflection on window glass. Soft distortion, city lights blend, ultra realistic.
2026-03-26.content:
## VEO3 Prompt - Reflection on Window — 8s

Camera captures Jhenn only through reflection on a window glass or glossy surface of the piano. She is playing, but we do not see her directly, only her reflection.

[0.0-3.0s] The reflection shows her silhouette against the bright city lights outside. Soft distortion from the glass. Hands occasionally appear, slightly blurred.

[3.0-6.0s] The camera (or viewpoint) shifts, the reflection warps subtly. We see her upper body and hands in motion, but never a direct frame.

[6.0-8.0s] Final moment: her face appears clearly in the reflection, eyes closed, feeling the music. City lights create bokeh background.

Ultra realistic, poetic, intimate. Vertical 9:16.

Duration: EXACTLY 8 seconds.

Scene: ONLY ONE window in front of her, camera outside looking in. Jhenn is sitting at a piano, her exposed leg visible due to the slit while she plays.

Music: Soft piano notes. Opening of Nothing Else Matters.
